task.summary: 5.2.3 adding mongoDB contents and some include files
5.2.3 adding mongoDB contents and some include files
5.8 new PDF viewer release add 'len' and 'nlen' field for chapters new textbook fixes fixed page numbers in textbooks

5.9 rewrote File Save handlers in filecommands.js to use promises

5.9a added looma-content-request (js, php, css) feature imported new content, including health/AIDS and pictures/Plant Content/Fungi
5.9.9 added Change Password feature other bug fixes
